isi.lyrics:
Lyric ORORA - Save Your Tears

Romanization

When all my nights grow cold
Timely depression knocks down my door
“It’s me, your favorite stranger”
When flashback memories fade
The fears rush in just fierce as ever
‘Did I abandon myself?’

Lost my wings in London
And Seoul froze all my warmest seasons
In New York, my heart was reborn
L.A. with fever dreams
I lost my purest heart in Paris
I knew it couldn’t claim me

Save your tears
’Cause after dark, the dawn will come
Save your tears
’Cause every end is a new start

People live in the past
Like it’s their one and only trophy
They held on to the old me
Blindfolds became untied
I caught a glimpse of what I had known
It’s time, I’m breaking away

Save your tears
’Cause after dark, the dawn will come
Save your tears
’Cause every end is a new start

Through winter, spring, summer, and fall
I cried an ocean out of me
It held the weight of memories
But now it sparkles in the sun
The pain once burned, now warms my core
I walk through shadows wanting more
Every scar I used to hide
Became the place where love’s alive
(So say it out loud)

Save your tears
’Cause after dark, the dawn will come
Save your tears
Release the fear, I’m on my way

Save yourself
There’s no one left to hold you down
Save yourself
’Cause every end is a new start

The love I gave you is forever yours
